story.title: Norvilla (Gwen) Findlay Oral History 03182023.WAV
story.description: The transcript is a rich oral history interview between Ruthanne Marchetti and Novilla "Gwen" Finley. Key topics discussed include Novilla’s migration journey from the Caribbean islands to Brooklyn, and later to Bloomfield, her family dynamics, especially the roles of her parents and siblings, and her experiences in different neighborhoods. It covers her professional life, touching upon her adaptability in corporate environments, and reflects on community, religion, and family values. The conversation highlights Bloomfield’s community dynamics, including its diversity, volunteerism, and evolving social interactions. Interwoven are Novilla's reflections on faith, generational changes, and maintaining familial connections.
